ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rfps" (
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RFP */,
  "rfp_name" TEXT /* Name of the RFP */,
  "rfp_description" TEXT /* Description of the RFP */,
  "rfp_version" TEXT /* Version of the RFP */,
  "rfp_status" TEXT /* Status of the RFP (e.g., Draft, Published, Closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the RFP was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the RFP was last updated */,
  "rfp_type" TEXT /* Type of RFP (e.g., Hardware, Software) */,
  "rfp_category" TEXT /* Category of RFP (e.g., Security, Network) */,
  "rfp_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rfp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "vendor_description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Street address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_city" TEXT /* City where the vendor is located */,
  "vendor_state" TEXT /* State where the vendor is located */,
  "vendor_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the vendor's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfp_clauses" (
  "clause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clause */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the clause belongs to */,
  "clause_number" TEXT /* Number of the clause within the RFP */,
  "clause_title" TEXT /* Title of the clause */,
  "clause_description" TEXT /* Description of the clause */,
  "clause_type" TEXT /* Type of clause (e.g., Technical, Financial) */,
  "clause_category" TEXT /* Category of clause (e.g., Security, Performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_clauses_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the response is for */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor providing the response */,
  "clause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clause the response is for */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the vendor's response */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or clarifications provided by the vendor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., Submitted, Reviewed, Approved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the response was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the response was last updated */,
  "response_file" TEXT /* File uploaded by the vendor as part of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_responses_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_responses_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_responses_clause_id FOREIGN KEY ("clause_id") REFERENCES rfp_clauses ("clause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfp_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score given to the vendor's response (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_reviews_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES vendor_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., Technical Evaluator, Procurement Officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfp_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_documents_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor response the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_documents_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES vendor_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfp_status_changes" (
  "status_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the status change is for */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the RFP */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the RFP */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status change occurred */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_status_changes_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfp_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the RFP */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfp_versions_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP being accessed */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor response being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the RFP or response */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES vendor_responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Procurement Officer, Technical Evaluator, Vendor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., RFP Published, Response Received) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message in the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Read, Unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "rfp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFP the score is for */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the score is for */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the vendor (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the score was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_scores_rfp_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfp_id") REFERENCES rfps ("rfp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_scores_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
